title: tsara` #6879
definition:
1) to be diseased of skin, be leprous
    1a) (Qal) to be a leper
    1b) (Pual) to have leprosy
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be diseased of skin, be leprous
    1a) (Qal) to be a leper
    1b) (Pual) to have leprosy

    NASB:  to be struck with leprosy, to be leprous
